plugins.name: napkin
plugins.description: End-to-end spec pipeline: turn a raw idea into a validated, build-seeded brief, judge it into a curated, feasibility-checked MVP feature list (per-feature reachability verdicts), then fork — BUILD it (collect a SaaS app's context — product, personas, glossary, capability map, RBAC, NFRs — into a flat spec/ workspace, author framework-agnostic Gherkin/BDD specs, and design + live-test a normalized DBML data model) or SELL it (settle the marketing message in spec/positioning.md, then render fact-faithful, on-voice landing/email/ads/social/launch copy to spec/copy/) — one aligned, drift-free flow from idea to features, schema, and go-to-market copy.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Turn a finished napkin spec into an opinionated build blueprint and hand off to the build loop. Reads the spec/ workspace, verifies the latest best-practice stack (Bun + Turborepo + TypeScript, Drizzle with a PGlite⇄Postgres-16 env switch, shared Zod contracts, a single use-case layer behind Hono API + MCP, Better Auth multi-tenancy/RBAC, Vercel AI SDK 5 with LLM fixtures, latest React + Tailwind/shadcn driven by impeccable, one mock⇄real ports abstraction, Pulumi/Cloud Run), then writes two DRY artifacts — spec/architecture.md (the standing reference) and spec/bootstrap.md (the kickoff runbook: a data-first build sequence with backend-complete + landing-page-first + stop-to-validate checkpoints) — and hands off to superpowers:writing-plans → subagent-driven-development. Blueprint + handoff only: it never runs scaffolding commands.
